text: dbr-yhvh  'shr hyh 'l-mykhh hmrshty bymy yvtm 'chz ychzqyh mlkhy yhvdh 'shr-chzh 'l-shmrvn vyrvshlm
shm'v 'mym khlm hqshyby 'rts vml'h vyhy 'dny yhvh bkhm l'd 'dny mhykhl qdshv
khy-hnh yhvh yts' mmqvmv vyrd vdrkh 'l- [bmvty kh] (bmty q) 'rts
vnmsv hhrym tchtyv vh'mqym ytbq'v khdvng mfny h'sh khmym mgrym bmvrd
bfsh' y'qb khl-z't vbcht'vt byt yshr'l my-fsh' y'qb hlv' shmrvn vmy bmvt yhvdh hlv' yrvshlm
vshmty shmrvn l'y hshdh lmt'y khrm vhgrty lgy 'bnyh vysdyh 'glh
vkhl-fsylyh ykhtv vkhl-'tnnyh yshrfv b'sh vkhl-'tsbyh 'shym shmmh khy m'tnn zvnh qbtsh v'd-'tnn zvnh yshvbv
'l-z't 'sfdh v'ylylh 'ylkhh [shyll kh] (shvll q) v'rvm ''shh msfd khtnym v'bl khbnvt y'nh
khy 'nvshh mkhvtyh khy-b'h 'd-yhvdh ng' 'd-sh'r 'my 'd-yrvshlm
bgt 'l-tgydv bkhv 'l-tbkhv bbyt l'frh 'fr [htflshty kh] (htflshy q)
'bry lkhm yvshbt shfyr 'ryh-bsht l' yts'h yvshbt ts'nn msfd byt h'tsl yqch mkhm 'mdtv
khy-chlh ltvb yvshbt mrvt khy-yrd r' m't yhvh lsh'r yrvshlm
rtm hmrkhbh lrkhsh yvshbt lkhysh r'shyt cht't hy' lbt-tsyvn khy-bkh nmts'v fsh'y yshr'l
lkhn ttny shlvchym 'l mvrsht gt bty 'khzyb l'khzb lmlkhy yshr'l
'd hyrsh 'by lkh yvshbt mrshh 'd-'dlm ybv' khbvd yshr'l
qrchy vgzy 'l-bny t'nvgykh hrchby qrchtkh khnshr khy glv mmkh    s
hvy chshby-'vn vf'ly r' 'l-mshkhbvtm b'vr hbqr y'shvh khy ysh-l'l ydm
vchmdv shdvt vgzlv vbtym vnsh'v v'shqv gbr vbytv v'ysh vnchltv  f
lkhn khh 'mr yhvh hnny chshb 'l-hmshfchh hz't r'h 'shr l'-tmyshv mshm tsv'rtykhm vl' tlkhv rvmh khy 't r'h hy'
byvm hhv' ysh' 'lykhm mshl vnhh nhy nhyh 'mr shdvd nshdnv chlq 'my ymyr 'ykh ymysh ly lshvbb shdynv ychlq
lkhn l'-yhyh lkh mshlykh chbl bgvrl bqhl yhvh
'l-ttfv ytyfvn l'-ytfv l'lh l' ysg khlmvt
h'mvr byt-y'qb hqtsr rvch yhvh 'm-'lh m'llyv hlv' dbry yytybv 'm hyshr hvlkh
v'tmvl 'my l'vyb yqvmm mmvl shlmh 'dr tfshtvn m'brym btch shvby mlchmh
nshy 'my tgrshvn mbyt t'ngyh m'l 'llyh tqchv hdry l'vlm
qvmv vlkhv khy l'-z't hmnvchh b'bvr tm'h tchbl vchbl nmrts
lv-'ysh hlkh rvch vshqr khzb 'tf lkh lyyn vlshkhr vhyh mtyf h'm hzh
'sf ''sf y'qb khlkh qbts 'qbts sh'ryt yshr'l ychd 'shymnv khts'n btsrh kh'dr btvkh hdbrv thymnh m'dm
'lh hfrts lfnyhm frtsv vy'brv sh'r vyts'v bv vy'br mlkhm lfnyhm vyhvh br'shm  f
v'mr shm'v-n' r'shy y'qb vqtsyny byt yshr'l hlv' lkhm ld't 't-hmshft
shn'y tvb v'hby [r'h kh] (r' q) gzly 'vrm m'lyhm vsh'rm m'l 'tsmvtm
v'shr 'khlv sh'r 'my v'vrm m'lyhm hfshytv v't-'tsmtyhm ftschv vfrshv kh'shr bsyr vkhbshr btvkh qlcht
'z yz'qv 'l-yhvh vl' y'nh 'vtm vystr fnyv mhm b't hhy' kh'shr hr'v m'llyhm  f
khh 'mr yhvh 'l-hnby'ym hmt'ym 't-'my hnshkhym bshnyhm vqr'v shlvm v'shr l'-ytn 'l-fyhm vqdshv 'lyv mlchmh
lkhn lylh lkhm mchzvn vchshkhh lkhm mqsm vb'h hshmsh 'l-hnby'ym vqdr 'lyhm hyvm
vbshv  hchzym vchfrv hqsmym v'tv 'l-shfm khlm khy 'yn m'nh 'lhym
v'vlm 'nkhy ml'ty khch 't-rvch yhvh vmshft vgbvrh lhgyd ly'qb fsh'v vlyshr'l cht'tv    s
shm'v-n' z't r'shy byt y'qb vqtsyny byt yshr'l hmt'bym mshft v't khl-hyshrh y'qshv
bnh tsyvn bdmym vyrvshlm b'vlh
r'shyh  bshchd yshftv vkhhnyh bmchyr yvrv vnby'yh bkhsf yqsmv v'l-yhvh ysh'nv l'mr hlv' yhvh bqrbnv l'-tbv' 'lynv r'h
lkhn bgllkhm tsyvn shdh tchrsh vyrvshlm 'yyn thyh vhr hbyt lbmvt y'r  f
vhyh  b'chryt hymym yhyh hr byt-yhvh nkhvn br'sh hhrym vnsh' hv' mgb'vt vnhrv 'lyv 'mym
vhlkhv gvym rbym v'mrv lkhv  vn'lh 'l-hr-yhvh v'l-byt 'lhy y'qb vyvrnv mdrkhyv vnlkhh b'rchtyv khy mtsyvn tts'  tvrh vdbr-yhvh myrvshlm
vshft byn 'mym rbym vhvkhych lgvym 'tsmym 'd-rchvq vkhttv chrbtyhm l'tym vchnyttyhm lmzmrvt l'-ysh'v gvy 'l-gvy chrb vl'-ylmdvn 'vd mlchmh
vyshbv 'ysh tcht gfnv vtcht t'ntv v'yn mchryd khy-fy yhvh tsb'vt dbr
khy khl-h'mym ylkhv 'ysh bshm 'lhyv v'nchnv nlkh bshm-yhvh 'lhynv l'vlm v'd  f
byvm hhv' n'm-yhvh 'sfh htsl'h vhndchh 'qbtsh v'shr hr'ty
vshmty 't-htsl'h lsh'ryt vhnhl'h lgvy 'tsvm vmlkh yhvh 'lyhm bhr tsyvn m'th v'd-'vlm  f
v'th mgdl-'dr 'fl bt-tsyvn 'dykh t'th vb'h hmmshlh hr'shnh mmlkht lbt-yrvshlm
'th lmh try'y r' hmlkh 'yn-bkh 'm-yv'tskh 'bd khy-hchzyqkh chyl khyvldh
chvly vgchy bt-tsyvn khyvldh khy-'th tts'y mqryh vshkhnt bshdh vb't 'd-bbl shm tntsly m yg'lkh yhvh mkhf 'ybykh
v'th n'sfv 'lykh gvym rbym h'mrym tchnf vtchz btsyvn 'ynynv
vhmh l' yd'v mchshbvt yhvh vl' hbynv 'tstv khy qbtsm kh'myr grnh
qvmy vdvshy bt-tsyvn khy-qrnkh 'shym brzl vfrstykh 'shym nchvshh vhdqvt 'mym rbym vhchrmty lyhvh bts'm vchylm l'dvn khl-h'rts
'th ttgddy bt-gdvd mtsvr shm 'lynv bshbt ykhv 'l-hlchy 't shft yshr'l    s
v'th byt-lchm 'frth ts'yr lhyvt b'lfy yhvdh mmkh ly yts' lhyvt mvshl byshr'l vmvts'tyv mqdm mymy 'vlm
lkhn ytnm 'd-'t yvldh yldh vytr 'chyv yshvbvn 'l-bny yshr'l
v'md vr'h b'z yhvh bg'vn shm yhvh 'lhyv vyshbv khy-'th ygdl 'd-'fsy-'rts
vhyh zh shlvm 'shvr  khy-ybv' b'rtsnv vkhy ydrkh b'rmntynv vhqmnv 'lyv shb'h r'ym vshmnh nsykhy 'dm
vr'v 't-'rts 'shvr bchrb v't-'rts nmrd bftchyh vhtsyl m'shvr khy-ybv' b'rtsnv vkhy ydrkh bgbvlnv    s
vhyh  sh'ryt y'qb bqrb 'mym rbym khtl m't yhvh khrbybym 'ly-'shb 'shr l'-yqvh l'ysh vl' yychl lbny 'dm
vhyh sh'ryt y'qb bgvym bqrb 'mym rbym kh'ryh bbhmvt y'r khkhfyr b'dry-ts'n 'shr 'm 'br vrms vtrf v'yn mtsyl
trm ydkh 'l-tsrykh vkhl-'ybykh ykhrtv  f
vhyh byvm-hhv' n'm-yhvh vhkhrty svsykh mqrbkh vh'bdty mrkhbtykh
vhkhrty 'ry 'rtskh vhrsty khl-mbtsrykh
vhkhrty khshfym mydkh vm'vnnym l' yhyv-lkh
vhkhrty fsylykh vmtsbvtykh mqrbkh vl'-tshtchvh 'vd lm'shh ydykh
vntshty 'shyrykh mqrbkh vhshmdty 'rykh
v'shyty b'f vbchmh nqm 't-hgvym 'shr l' shm'v    s
shm'v-n' 't 'shr-yhvh 'mr qvm ryb 't-hhrym vtshm'nh hgb'vt qvlkh
shm'v hrym 't-ryb yhvh vh'tnym msdy 'rts khy ryb lyhvh 'm-'mv v'm-yshr'l ytvkhch
'my mh-'shyty lkh vmh hl'tykh 'nh by
khy h'ltykh m'rts mtsrym vmbyt 'bdym fdytykh v'shlch lfnykh 't-mshh 'hrn vmrym
'my zkhr-n' mh-y'ts blq mlkh mv'b vmh-'nh 'tv bl'm bn-b'vr mn-hshtym 'd-hglgl lm'n d't tsdqvt yhvh
bmh 'qdm yhvh 'khf l'lhy mrvm h'qdmnv b'vlvt b'glym bny shnh
hyrtsh yhvh b'lfy 'ylym brbbvt nchly-shmn h'tn bkhvry fsh'y fry btny cht't nfshy
hgyd lkh 'dm mh-tvb vmh-yhvh dvrsh mmkh khy 'm-'shvt mshft v'hbt chsd vhtsn' lkht 'm-'lhykh  f
qvl yhvh l'yr yqr' vtvshyh yr'h shmkh shm'v mth vmy y'dh
'vd h'sh byt rsh' 'tsrvt rsh' v'yft rzvn z'vmh
h'zkhh bm'zny rsh' vbkhys 'bny mrmh
'shr 'shyryh ml'v chms vyshbyh dbrv-shqr vlshvnm rmyh bfyhm
vgm-'ny hchlyty hkhvtkh hshmm 'l-cht'tkh
'th t'khl vl' tshb' vyshchkh bqrbkh vtsg vl' tflyt v'shr tflt lchrb 'tn
'th tzr' vl' tqtsvr 'th tdrkh-zyt vl'-tsvkh shmn vtyrvsh vl' tshth-yyn
vyshtmr chqvt 'mry vkhl m'shh byt-'ch'b vtlkhv bm'tsvtm lm'n tty 'tkh lshmh vyshbyh lshrqh vchrft 'my tsh'v  f
'lly ly khy hyyty kh'sfy-qyts kh'llt btsyr 'yn-'shkhvl l'khvl bkhvrh 'vth nfshy
'bd chsyd mn-h'rts vyshr b'dm 'yn khlm ldmym y'rbv 'ysh 't-'chyhv ytsvdv chrm
'l-hr' khfym lhytyb hshr sh'l vhshft bshlvm vhgdvl dbr hvt nfshv hv' vy'btvh
tvbm khchdq yshr mmsvkhh yvm mtsfykh fqdtkh b'h 'th thyh mbvkhtm
'l-t'mynv br' 'l-tbtchv b'lvf mshkhbt chyqkh shmr ftchy-fykh
khy-bn mnbl 'b bt qmh b'mh khlh bchmth 'yby 'ysh 'nshy bytv
v'ny byhvh 'tsfh 'vchylh l'lhy ysh'y yshm'ny 'lhy
'l-tshmchy 'ybty ly khy nflty qmty khy-'shb bchshkh yhvh 'vr ly    s
z'f yhvh 'sh' khy cht'ty lv 'd 'shr yryb ryby v'shh mshfty yvtsy'ny l'vr 'r'h btsdqtv
vtr' 'ybty vtkhsh bvshh h'mrh 'ly 'yv yhvh 'lhykh 'yny tr'ynh bh 'th thyh lmrms khtyt chvtsvt
yvm lbnvt gdrykh yvm hhv' yrchq-chq
yvm hv' v'dykh ybv' lmny 'shvr v'ry mtsvr vlmny mtsvr v'd-nhr vym mym vhr hhr
vhyth h'rts lshmmh 'l-yshbyh mfry m'llyhm    s
r'h 'mkh bshbtkh ts'n nchltkh shkhny lbdd y'r btvkh khrml yr'v bshn vgl'd khymy 'vlm
khymy ts'tkh m'rts mtsrym 'r'nv nfl'vt
yr'v gvym vybshv mkhl gbvrtm yshymv yd 'l-fh 'znyhm tchrshnh
ylchkhv 'fr khnchsh khzchly 'rts yrgzv mmsgrtyhm 'l-yhvh 'lhynv yfchdv vyr'v mmkh
my-'l khmvkh nsh' 'vn v'br 'l-fsh' lsh'ryt nchltv l'-hchzyq l'd 'fv khy-chfts chsd hv'
yshvb yrchmnv ykhbsh 'vntynv vtshlykh bmtslvt ym khl-cht'vtm
ttn 'mt ly'qb chsd l'brhm 'shr-nshb't l'btynv mymy qdm
